description: Has unique operation keys within the document.
notes: JSON object semantics (per RFC 8259 and OBI-D-01) already require unique keys within an object. Duplicate-key violations cannot be expressed as inline JSON fixtures because the test harness's JSON parser would normalize or reject them. This rule is testable only via raw-text fixtures, which are out of scope for this corpus's inline format. The positive case below confirms the rule's basic shape.
